sentences.arabic: الْحُصُولُ عَلَى قَسْطٍ كَافٍ مِنَ النَّوْمِ ضَرُورِيٌّ لِلصِّحَّةِ النَّفْسِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Dobijanje dovoljno sna je neophodno za mentalno zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: Getting enough sleep is essential for mental health.

sentences.arabic: النَّوْمُ الْعَمِيقُ يُسَاعِدُ الدِّمَاغَ عَلَى الرَّاحَةِ وَالتَّرْكِيزِ.
sentences.translation: Dubok san pomaže mozgu da se odmori i fokusira.
sentences.translationEn: Deep sleep helps the brain to rest and focus.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ نَتَجَنَّبَ اسْتِخْدَامَ الْهَاتِفِ قَبْلَ مَوْعِدِ النَّوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Trebamo izbjegavati korištenje telefona prije spavanja.
sentences.translationEn: We should avoid using the phone before bedtime.

sentences.arabic: الْغُرْفَةُ الْهَادِئَةُ تَجْعَلُنَا نَشْعُرُ بِالرَّاحَةِ وَالطُّمَأْنِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Tiha soba čini da se osjećamo ugodno i smireno.
sentences.translationEn: A quiet room makes us feel comfortable and calm.
